title: Wimbledon tennis Day 2: Wawrinka plays last match in SW19, Shelton loses
description: Stan Wawrinka played his final match at Wimbledon on Tuesday night, and to say that it was a dramatic one would be a gross understatement. Wawrinka battled Matteo Berrettini for four hours and 19 minutes across four sets, all of which went to tiebreakers.
